{{Quote|Murderous thug.|The bounty posting brief on Kleng|<ref name="BH" />}}
'''Leekz Kleng''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] who was affiliated with a number of freelance Gran [[Assassin/Legends|hitmen]] by the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]. By this time, a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] had been placed on Kleng by an individual who considered the Gran a murderous thug. The individual, who wish to remain anonymous, offered 4000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for Kleng's capture, but was also willing to pay 2500 credits for his [[Death/Legends|death]]. Also affiliated with the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] [[King/Legends|king]] and [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Sebolto]], Kleng spent time on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] where Sebolto was based.<ref name="BH" />

{{GameDSmechanics}}
In 22 BBY, the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] traveled to Malastare in order to capture Sebolto and learn of his contacts with the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]] cult. While traveling through the planet's jungles in order to reach [[Sebolto's Palace]], Fett encountered Kleng who attacked him with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. The Mandalorian however, was able to defeat the Gran and capture him alive, claiming the bounty on him.<ref name="BH" />
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Leekz Kleng first appeared in the [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' released in [[2002]]. Shortly prior to the game's release he was also mentioned in ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'', a strategy guide for the game released by [[Prima Games]]. Kleng's role in the game was that of an optional secondary bounty within the game's tenth mission, which was part of the fourth chapter. It is possible for players to claim the bounty on Kleng alive or dead, or not at all, however this article assumes that players captured the Gran alive, at this is the most profitable outcome and required for one hundred percent game completion.
